description: Lists properties and responses of cable elements in the range. If no keyword is given, the default output of the command is that associated with the information keyword.

keywords.name: force-axial
keywords.description: axial forces exerted by the nodes on the element

keywords.name: force-node
keywords.description: list nodal forces. By default, components are displayed in terms of the element local coordinate systems. These are the forces exerted by the nodes on the element.

keywords.name: force-node-local
keywords.description: list forces in terms of the element local coordinate system (the default)

keywords.name: force-node-global
keywords.description: list forces in terms of the global coordinate system

keywords.name: group
keywords.description: list group to which the element belongs. By default, lists all slots with group assignments. If the slot keyword is used, only the contents of that slot is listed.

keywords.name: information
keywords.description: lists general element information, including id and component-id numbers, connected nodes, centroids, surface area, volume, and the hide and select status

keywords.name: yield
keywords.description: indicator of whether or not the element itself has yielded

keywords.name: force-axial
keywords.description: axial forces exerted by the nodes on the element

keywords.name: force-node
keywords.description: list nodal forces. By default, components are displayed in terms of the element local coordinate systems. These are the forces exerted by the nodes on the element.

keywords.name: force-node-local
keywords.description: list forces in terms of the element local coordinate system (the default)

keywords.name: force-node-global
keywords.description: list forces in terms of the global coordinate system

keywords.name: group
keywords.description: list group to which the element belongs. By default, lists all slots with group assignments. If the slot keyword is used, only the contents of that slot is listed.

keywords.name: information
keywords.description: lists general element information, including id and component-id numbers, connected nodes, centroids, surface area, volume, and the hide and select status

keywords.name: yield
keywords.description: indicator of whether or not the element itself has yielded

keywords.name: apply
keywords.description: axial tension that will be maintained during cycling

keywords.name: force-axial
keywords.description: axial force in the cable (average of the two end forces)

keywords.name: force-node-global
keywords.description: generalized nodal forces (force and moment) acting on the element. These are the generalized forces exerted by the nodes on the element. express the values in the element coordinate system (the default) express the values in the global coordinate system

keywords.name: group
keywords.description: group assignment(s). If slot is specified, then list the group assignment, if any, in slot s .

keywords.name: grout
keywords.description: information about the grout that is modeled as coupling springs that connect the cable to the target object (zones in FLAC3D and 3DEC, and particles in PFC3D): confinement, displacement, stress, yield state and average axial direction

keywords.name: information
keywords.description: general element information: nodal connectivity, centroid, surface area, volume, and hide/select status

keywords.name: property-young
keywords.description: Scaled properties are returned if the scaled keyword ( FLAC2D ONLY ) is set to true (the default is false). If the property cannot be scaled, an error is emitted. cross-sectional area mass density grout cohesion per unit length name of the table relating grout cohesion to relative shear displacement grout friction angle name of the table relating grout friction angle to relative shear displacement grout exposed perimeter grout stiffness per unit length large-strain sliding flag large-strain sliding tolerance tensile failure strain thermal-expansion coefficient compressive yield strength tensile yield strength Young’s modulus

keywords.name: stress
keywords.description: axial stress in the cable (not to be confused with stress in the grout)

keywords.name: yield
keywords.description: yield state indicating whether or not the cable has yielded
